name: EHC 8468 — Dairy products for human consumption (DAIRY-PRODUCTS-PT)

metadata.description: UK dairy products for human consumption requiring pasteurisation treatment. Covers standard EU export routes via Calais (SIVEP), Esbjerg, Rotterdam, Rosslare, Dublin, Belfast. Header: 'Dairy products intended for human consumption that are required to undergo a pasteurisation treatment'. Part II header: 'Certificate model DAIRY-PRODUCTS-PT'. I.20 'Products for human consumption' must be ticked.
metadata.notes: Shares source file with EHC 8322. Claude reads the full markdown rule set on every check and applies Parts A + B + D + E for 8468 certificates.
